parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ file_name: $json.file_name, file_type: $json.file_type, minio_path: $json.minio_path, file_url: $json.file_url, file_size: $json.file_size, uploaded_at: $json.uploaded_at, is_active: $json.is_active }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const saved = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { success: true, file_id: saved.Id, file_url: saved.file_url || $('Code Upload Process').first().json.file_url } }];
